# script is no longer a reserved Datastar render-callback family. As an ordinary
# argument it must resolve to a path value or a method parameter; here it does
# neither, so generation fails with an unknown-argument error.
! muxt generate --use-receiver-type=Server --use-datastar
stderr 'unknown argument script at index 1'

-- template.gohtml --
{{- define "GET /script.js Widget(ctx, script)" -}}console.log("{{- .Result -}}");{{- end -}}
-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.25
-- server.go --
package server

import (
	"context"
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))

type Server struct{}

func (Server) Widget(ctx context.Context, script func(msg string) error) {
	_ = script("hi")
}
